rulings.Rulings: Off calendar. This matter must be set on the law and motion calendar. Although the pleading says per Rosie, the time and date on the pleading is Monday morning, July 7, at 9 a.m., which is the regular morning probate calendar. Counsel must call Rosie at 551-3702, clearly identify his pleading as a motion and ask her for a time and date on the law and motion calendar.
